# Amaljith Kuttamath

> AI engineer with 7+ years of experience, researching LLM trust and safety. Builds open-source interpretability tooling and interactive machine learning experiments that run entirely in the browser.

This is a personal portfolio and research site. All playground experiments perform real computation client-side (WebGPU / WASM), with no server or API behind them.

## Pages

- [Home](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/): overview, current status, featured writing
- [Work](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/work): projects, interactive demos, and writing
- [Blog](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/blog): all posts on LLM internals, evaluation, and tooling
- [Playground](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/playground): interactive ML experiments in the browser
- [About](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/about): background, credentials, contact

## Playground experiments

- [microGPT Trainer](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/playground/microgpt): train a tiny transformer live and watch embeddings, attention, and loss evolve
- [Tokenizer Arena](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/playground/tokens): compare five real production tokenizers (GPT-4o, Claude, Llama 3, GPT-2, BERT) on any text
- [Local Chat](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/playground/chat): chat with SmolLM2 running on WebGPU, fully client-side
- [Watch a Model Think](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/work/watch-model-think): token-by-token visualization of model predictions, calibration, and feature interference

## Selected projects

- [trust-bench](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/trust-bench): interpretability toolkit probing SAE features, activations, and circuits in language models
- [calibration-probe](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/calibration-probe): measuring how well LLMs know what they know
- [crux](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/crux): terminal dashboard for understanding AI coding sessions and token usage
- [tokenizer-arena](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/tokenizer-arena): Rust benchmark of tokenizer implementations
- [gguf-inspect](https://github.com/amaljithkuttamath/gguf-inspect): Rust tool for inspecting GGUF model files

## Feeds

- [RSS (full post content)](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/rss.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://amaljithkuttamath.github.io/sitemap-index.xml)
